title: Command Search Ledger Cockpit
concept: A light technical Playground cockpit where command search and grouped command results drive route-specific forms, while an operations ledger, event stream, saved-object list, and protected live WordPress shell show every save, rename, delete, import, export, file, database, and Blueprint action mutating the same selected Playground object.
flows: Save a temporary Playground to a local directory with folder picker, denied permission state, granted permission, file-copy progress, selected folder identity, local storage badge, saved row mutation, reload consequence, preview state, transfer history, and event record
Save in browser storage with a distinct slug, file-copy progress, browser storage badge, saved identity, saved list mutation, preview state, and event record
Rename and delete the active Playground with shell title mutation, saved row mutation, delete confirmation/cancel, final deleted state, temporary fallback, and event stream updates

Run create and import routes for Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import with route-specific inputs and constraints
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip from persistent tabs while the live WordPress shell remains visible
Complete a file operation by selecting wp-config.php, editing to a dirty state, saving, clearing the dirty marker, updating preview status, and recording the event
Complete database and portability operations with SQLite path and size, database download, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, GitHub export, ZIP download, Blueprint copy/download/run, and transfer history records
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview input
Gutenberg PR or branch preview input
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token caveat
Blueprint URL runner with validation
Import .zip with selected archive and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint entries including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save in this browser with progress and browser slug identity
Save to a local directory with folder picker, permission denial, permission grant, progress, folder identity, local badge, and reconnect consequence
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Open/manage, rename, delete confirmation, cancel, row mutation, and temporary fallback
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory storage distinctions
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite controls
Destructive reset and saved/local reload consequences
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with validation, copy link, download bundle, run, warning, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic notice state
Export to GitHub with repository target and session-only token consequence
Download active Playground as .zip
Database download
Blueprint bundle actions
Operations ledger and transfer history for saves, edits, downloads, imports, exports, delete, reset, and navigation
